description_long: This juice bar features a compact, rectangular kiosk structure with a prominent overhanging canopy and a deep counter for serving. The front counter displays a set of cups, a teapot, and a carafe, with a visible heating element or burner beneath one vessel, suggesting hot beverage preparation. The back of the bar is organized with multiple shelves holding additional cups, pitchers, and a stack of plates, providing ample storage and display space. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a matte black finish, giving it a modern, understated appearance. The bar appears to be constructed primarily from solid panels, with functional shelving and a sturdy base. No visible signage, menu boards, or fruit displays are present, and the equipment is limited to basic beverage preparation tools.
description: A modern, matte black juice bar kiosk with a deep counter, overhanging canopy, and organized shelving for cups and pitchers. The setup is minimalist, with beverage preparation items and no visible signage or fruit displays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main counter with cups, a teapot, a carafe on a burner, and a cylindrical container, all beneath a large overhanging canopy.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter and canopy, with a partial view of the serving area and some items on the counter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple shelves filled with cups, pitchers, and a stack of plates, highlighting the bar's storage and organization.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the structure's depth and the arrangement of items on the counter and shelves.
